title: Is there a way to bulk clear inbox notifications?
excerpt: Our Monday platform is running very slowly lately. I’ve archived a ton of stuff but that hasn’t helped. Is there a way to bulk clear all of my inbox notifications? I don’t use it much so there are more than 2000 messages…

posts.author: amyfarrell (Amy Farrell)
posts.cookedHtml: Our Monday platform is running very slowly lately. I’ve archived a ton of stuff but that hasn’t helped. Is there a way to bulk clear all of my inbox notifications? I don’t use it much so there are more than 2000 messages in there. I’m wondering if it will help speed things up if I clear them all out and I’m looking for a way to do that quickly without clicking the blue checkmark 2000 times. Thanks!

posts.author: Emily (Emily Temkin)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey! While there’s no way to bulk clear all inbox notifications, check out this video for a trick of how to do it quickly: https://www.loom.com/share/90cf57f0fb9f4a3e863735be71ec3e95

posts.author: amyfarrell (Amy Farrell)
posts.cookedHtml: That worked great - thank you so much!

posts.author: Krishele (Krishele Guzman)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s awesome Emily. Any fancy trick for clearing the notifications in the Bell icon?

posts.author: JohnMonte7 (John Monte)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m wondering the same thing… bulk clearing notifications in the bell icon.

We are now using the bell notification for PRIORITY ONLY updates. So, if a pulse is changed to HIGH priority that person is alerted in the notifications section.

But previously, every board was notifying you of a “done” “new pulse” simply because you were “subscribed” and it was a lot!

So I’m trying to help myself + our team start fresh with a bulk notifications clearing.

posts.author: flaviu (Flaviu Simihaian)
posts.cookedHtml: I need this too. Did you solve it?

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
JohnMonte7:

We are now using the bell notification for PRIORITY ONLY updates. So, if a pulse is changed to HIGH priority that person is alerted in the notifications section.

But previously, every board was notifying you of a “done” “new pulse” simply because you were “subscribed” and it was a lot!

How did you manage to get only PRIORITY notifications here? This would be awesome.
I am going crazy of the automation-robot telling me which actions I did (new items that I added myself for example)

posts.author: mcdonasa (Samantha Lehmond)
posts.cookedHtml: Also looking for a way to bulk delete bell notifications…

posts.author: JohnMonte7 (John Monte)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sorry, I didn’t see this. If you’re still needing help:

we turned off all other notifications from boards in the automation center but created a notification: “when priority changes to HIGH, notify person.”

So we use the notifications as “emergency” or “todo rn” types of things. It doesn’t stop the “reply” from an update that someone comments on but it still drastically decreased the amount of notifications youd get.

posts.author: Marikie (Marikie Pelser)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Emily - I am excited to watch the video, but seems like the link isnt active anymore? Any way I can access it? Appreciate your help!

posts.author: Emily (Emily Temkin)
posts.cookedHtml: I made another video for you! Here you go: https://www.loom.com/share/3d5c590e165a47278a7dbc91bd97016e. You can clear your inbox board by board, which makes it go a bit faster. Let us know if this helps!

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
Awesome idea. Thanks for the tip, I will use this on several boards.

Cheers!

posts.author: Marikie (Marikie Pelser)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks Emily - that is an awesome trick!

Do you have a similar work around to clear the “Bell notifications” (alerts sent via the automations?). Thanks for your help!

posts.author: JenK (Jen Kolarik)
posts.cookedHtml: @Emily Did anyone ever get a solution to bulk clearing out the bell notifications?

posts.author: Topio (Javier Silva)
posts.cookedHtml: That link is dead now. Any chance to get an update?

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Those of you who want to clear bell notifications, you can delete or mark them as read using the 3 dot menu. Here’s a screenshot -

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
